---
name: Core or profile proposal
about: Propose a change to APP core, a profile, or an extension boundary
title: "[proposal] "
labels: design
assignees: Poke-nushi
---

## Area

- core
- profile
- extension
- editorial

## Problem statement

What gap or inconsistency are you trying to address?

## Proposed change

Describe the new semantics, field, or rule.

## Why APP?

Explain why this belongs in APP rather than A2A, MCP, OAuth, OpenID, VC, or deployment policy.

## Compatibility impact

Explain whether existing schemas, examples, or verifier behavior would change.

## References

List relevant specs, drafts, issues, or implementations.
